'''kawofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphodontid|xiphodontid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphodontid|xiphodontid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kawofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwefeth|kæwefeth]] || [[word:kæwefej|kæwefej]] || [[word:kæwefesh|kæwefesh]] || [[word:kæwefe|kæwefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawowofoth|kawowofoth]] || [[word:kawowofoj|kawowofoj]] || [[word:kawowofosh|kawowofosh]] || [[word:kawowofo|kawowofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawofoth|kawofoth]] || [[word:kawofoj|kawofoj]] || [[word:kawofosh|kawofosh]] || [[word:kawofo|kawofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawoffoth|kawoffoth]] || [[word:kawoffoj|kawoffoj]] || [[word:kawoffosh|kawoffosh]] || [[word:kawoffof|kawoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawofotho|kawofotho]] || [[word:kawofojo|kawofojo]] || [[word:kawofosho|kawofosho]] || [[word:kawofoko|kawofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawofoth|kawofoth]] || [[word:kawofoj|kawofoj]] || [[word:kawofosh|kawofosh]] || [[word:kawofo|kawofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawofothol|kawofothol]] || [[word:kawofojol|kawofojol]] || [[word:kawofoshol|kawofoshol]] || [[word:kawofokol|kawofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawofothotho|kawofothotho]] || [[word:kawofojojo|kawofojojo]] || [[word:kawofoshosho|kawofoshosho]] || [[word:kawofoko|kawofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawofothon|kawofothon]] || [[word:kawofojon|kawofojon]] || [[word:kawofoshon|kawofoshon]] || [[word:kawofokon|kawofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawofothoro|kawofothoro]] || [[word:kawofojoro|kawofojoro]] || [[word:kawofoshoro|kawofoshoro]] || [[word:kawofokoro|kawofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
